name: opendocu
description: Local-first documentation memory for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Grow and query a local versioned docs store.
interface.longDescription: OpenDocu provides a deterministic CLI for indexing and searching local versioned Markdown documentation, plus a Codex skill that teaches agents how to normalize official docs, grow the store, and maintain source-backed semantic retrieval cards.
defaultPrompt: Use OpenDocu to search local official docs before answering.
